headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) After 160% One Year Surge?
summary: Wondering whether Monolithic Power Systems at US$1,353 is offering good value or stretching expectations? This article walks through what the current price might be saying. The stock shows returns of 3.1% over the past week, 25.6% over the past month, 44.5% year to date, and 159.7% over the last year, which naturally raises questions about what is already priced in. Recent attention on the company has focused on its role within the semiconductor sector and how investors are grouping it with...
